control_objective: Identity & credential mgmt / MFA on privileged accounts
test_procedure: Inspect IAM user list and MFA status export; confirm no shared accounts and MFA enforced on all privileged users
Review IAM policies for wildcard (*) grants; sample 5 users against job role; confirm quarterly access-review evidence
Confirm CloudTrail enabled (design) and inspect evidence of daily log review / alert triage over the period (operating)
Inspect IR plan document (design) and request tabletop / after-action records for the period (operating)
Inspect training program (design) and sample completion records + phishing-simulation results (operating)
Inspect vendor risk procedure (design) and sample onboarded vendors for questionnaire + BAA on file (operating)
Inspect backup configuration (design) and request most recent successful restore-test record (operating)
Inspect RDS and S3 encryption settings and key-management configuration
Inspect approved information security policy and confirm review / approval dates
